findings.title: Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanWorld-Voyager
findings.reasoning: Strong academic-industrial backing with real-time 3D reconstruction capabilities directly applicable to procedural world building and asset pipeline automation.
findings.description: Voyager is an interactive RGBD video generation model conditioned on camera input, and supports real-time 3D reconstruction.

findings.title: imlixinyang/FlashWorld
findings.reasoning: ICLR oral paper demonstrating rapid 3D scene generation, offering high potential for accelerating level design workflows despite moderate current adoption.
findings.description: Code for "FlashWorld: High-quality 3D Scene Generation within Seconds" (ICLR 2026 Oral)

findings.title: FuchengSu/WorldStereo
findings.reasoning: Promising CVPR research on 3D geometric memory for scene reconstruction, though currently niche and primarily academic rather than a plug-and-play game tool.
findings.description: [CVPR 2026] WorldStereo: Bridging Camera-Guided Video Generation and Scene Reconstruction via 3D Geometric Memories (WorldExpand of HY-World 2.0)

findings.title: HFrajacomo/Draconic-Revolution
findings.reasoning: Practical Unity-based voxel RPG with procedural generation that serves as a solid reference implementation and template for indie developers.
findings.description: A 3D Voxel-Based RPG with procedural world generation made with Unity

findings.title: tomicz/one-shot-prompt-world-generation-unity
findings.reasoning: Highly relevant LLM-driven Unity world generator that could streamline level design, though currently experimental with low star count.
findings.description: One prompt. An LLM agent builds a complete procedural 3D landscape inside the Unity Editor. Terrain, splat maps, water, props, lighting, clouds, and a horizon ring — all from a single message.

findings.title: Show HN: Seele AI – Generate playable games from text prompts using MLLM
findings.reasoning: Promising MLLM-focused engine for text-to-playable-game generation, though early-stage and unproven at scale.
findings.description:
I'm a co-founder of Seele AI. We are building a generative engine designed specifically for game development.

Unlike typical code-generation tools that rely on general-purpose LLMs, we have developed our own Multimodal LLM (MLLM) optimized for gaming. It doesn't just output text/code; it natively handles 3D models, spatial coordinates, and visual information to construct the game world.

Key Features:

Engine Support: We currently support real-time generation for Three.js and
